summary: OpenNori self-dogfood no longer lets Product AC completion hide architecture risk: missing Architecture Baseline, stale agent guide, challenged baseline, or unhealthy build-vs-buy now prevents confident completion while preserving objective_complete and Product current_gap semantics.

sources.label: npx vitest run test/core.test.js -t 'missing architecture baseline|build-vs-buy'
sources.command: npx vitest run test/core.test.js -t 'missing architecture baseline|build-vs-buy'

reviewability: Run npm run check and the targeted tests, then inspect README and reporting Skill for the same review-risk language.
limitations: This verifies the current self-dogfood boundary; a real non-OpenNori project dogfood remains a separate AC-A-10 adoption proof.
